headline: 1 Industrials Stock with Promising Prospects and 2 We Find Risky
summary: Whether you see them or not, industrials businesses play a crucial part in our daily activities. But their prominence also brings high exposure to the ups and downs of economic cycles. Luckily, their overall demand was steady over the past six months as the industry’s 8% return has closely followed the S&P 500.

headline: 9% Undervalued? Parker Hannifin (PH) After Its Russell 1000 Index Removal
summary: Index removal puts Parker-Hannifin stock in focus Parker-Hannifin (PH) was removed from the Russell 1000 Dynamic Index on June 27, an index change that can prompt rebalancing by investors tracking the benchmark and draw attention to the stock’s recent performance profile. See our latest analysis for Parker-Hannifin. Since touching recent highs, the Parker-Hannifin share price has slipped 1.9% over the past day and 2.6% over the past week. This move likely reflects investors adjusting...
